metadata.title: Sneaking a Mid Flank to Outsmart Opponents in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how a quick flank through mid changes the round. Timing and positioning make all the difference here. How do you pull off flanks in your games?

Think you’d pull off a flank like this? Let me know in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #clutch
metadata.cta: Think you’d pull off a flank like this? Let me know in the comments!
